message:
fix(codegen+runtime): Add IntResult type and BigInt equality comparison

- Add NativeType.int_result variant for __floor__/__ceil__/__trunc__/__round__
- Update type inference to return .int_result instead of .unknown
- Export runtime.IntResult from runtime.zig
- Fix pyValueEql to handle cross-type comparisons:
  - BigInt vs float: convert BigInt to float for comparison
  - BigInt vs int: use BigInt.fromInt for proper comparison
  - int vs BigInt: convert int to BigInt for comparison
- Fix pyAnyEql to convert unions to PyValue for cross-type equality

This fixes test_float_floor and test_float_ceil tests where IntResult
(from floatFloorBig/floatCeilBig) needed to compare with integers and floats.
